title: zenkerella grotei
parts: Zenkerella grotei has many medicinal parts, such as the roots, leaves, and bark. The roots contain various bioactive compounds, including alkaloids, glycosides, and sesquiterpenes, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The leaves and bark of Zenkerella grotei have been found to contain flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Additionally, the plant's flowers have been reported to contain terpenoids and carotenoids, which are known for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities.
